title: get current user profile success
description: Verify that an authenticated user can successfully retrieve their own profile by sending a GET request to /api/users/me with a valid auth token and receiving a 200 response with the user's profile data.

title: get current user profile unauthorized
description: Verify that a request to GET /api/users/me without an auth token returns a 401 unauthorized error response.

title: get current user profile invalid token
description: Verify that a request to GET /api/users/me with an invalid or expired auth token returns a 500 error response.

title: admin user listing success
description: Verify that an authenticated admin user can retrieve a list of all users by sending a GET request to /api/users with a valid admin auth token and receiving a 200 response with an array of user profiles.

title: admin user listing non admin failure
description: Verify that a request to GET /api/users with a valid non-admin auth token returns an authorization failure or error response.

title: admin user listing unauthorized
description: Verify that a request to GET /api/users without an auth token returns a 401 unauthorized error response.

title: admin user listing invalid token
description: Verify that a request to GET /api/users with an invalid or expired auth token returns a 500 error response.
